title: Sysmon DNS Data Exfiltration
description: Detects DNS queries with high-entropy subdomains that may indicate data exfiltration via DNS tunneling. Encoded data in subdomain labels is a common technique for covert data transfer.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Query Name' REGEX MATCH '^[a-zA-Z0-9]{30,}\.') or (('Query Name' like '*.dnscat.*' or 'Query Name' like '*.dns2tcp.*' or 'Query Name' like '*.iodine.*' or 'Query Name' like '*.dnsexfil.*')) or ('Query Name' REGEX MATCH '^[0-9a-f]{20,}\.'))
